# Gemini Adapter

Use the canonical skill through `.agents/skills/sync-agent-workbench/SKILL.md` when available. Generate `.gemini/skills/sync-agent-workbench/SKILL.md` only when a project explicitly requests a Gemini-native mirror.

If a Gemini extension or built-in command provides an official equivalent in the current environment, prefer that native surface and keep the canonical skill as fallback.
